---
name: Task family request
about: Propose a new bounded Queenshift task family or an improvement to an existing one
title: "[task-family] "
labels: task-family
assignees: ""
---

Use this for bounded product-scope requests.

If the report is really about a security weakness, use `SECURITY.md` instead of this template.

## Summary

Describe the task shape you want Queenshift to support.

## Example Task Text

Paste one explicit task example.

## Named Files And Repo Shape

List the files involved and the repo shape you expect.

## Why Current Families Do Not Fit

Say which current families come closest and why they are not enough.

## Smallest Useful Proof

Describe the smallest bounded example that would prove the request.

## Risk Boundary

Name what must still stay out of scope or fail closed even if the request is accepted.
